text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of openness and calm, almost as though I am waiting for something to happen in this empty, modern space. The bright lights and clean lines make me aware of the stillness, prompting reflection.

In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and engaging displays about research and development, I feel curiosity waking within me. There is excitement here—a sense that knowledge and innovation are being celebrated. This contrast between silent expanse and lively information urges me to ponder the spaces in which we learn and share ideas.
